sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71028" key="norqakinoi/" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νορθακινοί·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀσθενεῖς,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νόρρος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄνθος μήλινον λωτοῦ,</foreign> Id.: also a tree growing by the sea (also called <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νορειά</foreign>), Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νορύειν·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γῆν ὀρύειν</foreign> (sic), Id.</entryFree>
